bk={}local bl=false local bm={}local function bn(bo,bp)bm[bp]=bo;return bm[bp]end local bo={}bo[1]=2 bo[2]=2 bo[3]=4 local bo=-45479 local bp=0 local bp=0 repeat if bo>=24275 then if bo<=29345 then if end else bo=bk[5]end end else if bo<=-43731 then if bo<=-45479 then x=i+4 y=(x<=h)and 5 or(h-i+1)if y==0 then do bl=true break end end z,ba,bb,bc,bd=f(d,i,x)ba=ba or 117 bb=bb or 117 bk[1]=bm[-45479+75832]or bn(70515,-45479+75832)bp,bo=-39970,-39970 else bp,bo=bk[4],bk[4]end else if bo<=-39970 then bp,bo=bk[1],bk[1]else if bo<=-30515 then i=i+5 bk[5]=bm[-30515+337974]or bn(26164,-30515+337974)bo=36121 else if y<5 then bj=b(bj,1,y-1)end g[j]=bj j=j+1 bk[4]=bm[-26984+75832]or bn(-30515,-26984+75832)bp,bo=-43731,-43731 end end end end until bo==26164 if bl then break end end return c(g)end else if o<67720 then break else do l[1]={}g=l[1]end do l[2]=#d h=l[2]end i=1 l[3]=m[67720+64494]or n(-18136,67720+64494)w,o=-46171,-46171 end end until o==49341 end q[31]=r[-38045+154678]or s(38706,-38045+154678)v,u=-42373,-42373 end else if u~=-42373 then v,u=q[30],q[30]else v,u=q[31],q[31]end end else if u>=-30433 then if u==-30433 then u=q[29]else u=q[38]end else if u~=-32450 then do q[5]=string.gmatch p[(2056-624)]=q[5]end p[3928]=rawget do q[6]=string.gsub p[(5844-1805)]=q[6]end do q[7]=string.len p[(5126-2586)]=q[7]end p[9944]=error do q[8]=math.min p[(1336+((-88381864)+88388318))]=q[8]end t[2]=(t[2]+1)%5 q[36]=r[-35247+154678]or s(-11245,-35247+154678)u=71836 else v,u=q[41],q[41]end end end end end until u==85171 end)(math.floor,string.sub,table.concat,(load or loadstring),string.char,string.byte)
